reason: A Fish Called Wanda is a witty caper filled with mischievous glee
The Princess Bride is a playful, clever romp brimming with charm
This Is Spinal Tap skewers rock with joyous, irreverent humor
Austin Powers gleefully spoofs spies with cheeky, playful energy
Get Shorty’s crime-comedy charms with sly humor and clever twists
The Usual Suspects smartly toys with you right up to the end
Grosse Pointe Blank mixes witty banter with a fun hit-man twist
Madness of King George amusingly reveals human folly
Four Weddings and a Funeral is a charming, playful romantic comedy
